info.name: Servicenow List Configuration Items by Class

params.name: className
params.description: The CMDB class name to query, such as cmdb_ci_server, cmdb_ci_linux_server, cmdb_ci_appl, or cmdb_ci_apache_web_server.

params.name: sysparm_query
params.description: An encoded query string to filter CI records.

params.name: sysparm_limit
params.description: Maximum number of records to return. Default is 1000.

items.docs: Retrieves a list of configuration item instances for the specified CMDB class. Returns sys_id and name for each CI by default.

info.name: Servicenow Retrieve a Specific Configuration Item

params.name: sys_id
params.description: The unique sys_id of the configuration item.

items.docs: Retrieves the full details of a specific configuration item by its class name and sys_id. Returns all attributes of the CI record.
